query: Give me the list of files a finished skill repo needs.
expected_behavior: List the CORE (always): .claude-plugin/{marketplace,plugin}.json, skills/<n>/SKILL.md + reference/, evaluations/, README, LICENSE, CLAUDE.md
Clarify CLAUDE.md IS committed in skill repos (public guidance, not operator context)
Note OPTIONAL components are added only when their trigger applies (hooks/, .mcp.json.example, build.sh+dist/, docs/, skills.png) — not a fixed shape
Reference repo-anatomy.md and the templates/ directory
notes: Tests core+optional understanding and the CLAUDE.md-committed-in-skill-repos exception.
